title: Wrova Unbreakable Plastic Plates Set of 8-8 Inch Reusable Deep Plates for Kitchen, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe, Kitchen Set for Snacks & Desserts (Vivid Mix)
features: 【Unbreakable & Lightweight】- Wrova plastic plates *8 are unbreakable and practical. Wrova lightweight plates are constructed with food-grade PP, BPA free and reusable. Lightweight and Stack-able are other advantages,they really suitable for kitchen and camping.

【Dishwasher & Microwave Safe】- Wrova reusable deep plates for kitchen are Microwave safe and Dishwasher safe, temperature resistance ranges from -4°F to 248°F. Also available for Freezer. Easy to clean and store,our plates make your life more convenient.

【An Ideal Reusable Plates Option】- this reusable dinner plate is an alternative to disposable dinnerware and can be used over and over again. Sturdy in daily use, this unbreakable plate shrugs off drops and bumps.
【Premium Matte Finish】-Classic series of plastic plates are pure black with Matte Finish. Elegant color making them have similar elegant appearance with ceramic plates but non-fragile.

【Versatile】- Wrova melamine plates are lightweight, suitable for every meal, serving sandwich, bread and butter, dessert, salad, appetizer, etc. Whether indoor or out door, our plates will show their excellent quality.

【Your Smile,Our Mission】- Wrova plastic plates is also suitable for gifting.Wrova is confident in its product and wants nothing more than the buyer's satisfaction.If you're not satisfied with our plates. We're here to help.
description: Product Description About Wrova Reusable Plates Set REUSABLE PLATES Reliable Material : Made of 100% food-grade pp material, BPA free. Lightweight Plates : While maintaining size, each plastic plate weighs only 2.8 ounces, making it very light and suitable for picnics. Unbreakable plates : Unlike traditional porcelain and metal plates, these plates will neither shatter nor deform after an accidental drop. Smooth plate edge The Perfect craftsmanship and strict quality inspection can ensure that every plastic plate in your hand is qualified and free of burrs. Thickened anti-slip bottom We have thickened the bottom of the unbreakable plate to make it more non-slip and easy to hold, with a beautiful appearance and texture. Space saving style These plates are light and easy to stack, you don't have to worry about them collapsing and damaging by stacking too much, because they don't break easily. 10 OZ Bowl Set - Multi 40 oz Bowls Set - Beige 16 PCS Dinner Set - Colorful 12 OZ Drinking Cup - Black 16 OZ Mug Set - White 40 PCS Dinner Set - Green Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 117 4.6 out of 5 stars 117 4.1 out of 5 stars 36 4.7 out of 5 stars 78 4.7 out of 5 stars 78 4.7 out of 5 stars 32 Price £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £18.99 £ 18 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £29.99 £ 29 . 99 Quantity 8 PCS 6 PCS 16 PCS 6 PCS 6 PCS 40 PCS Volume/Size 10 OZ 40 OZ 16 PCS 12 OZ 16 OZ 40 PCS Dishwasher Safe ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Microwave Safe ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Freezer Safe ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Unbreakable ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Reusable ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
